nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 花脸山裸鼻雀
nodes.summary: 花脸山裸鼻雀（Masked mountain tanager，学名 Tephrophilus wetmorei），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The masked mountain tanager is endemic to the high Andes of Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru, where it inhabits mossy forests, moist dwarf forests, grass, bamboo, and mossy scrublands at elevations of

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is generally rare or uncommon, and is threatened by habitat loss
